content_body: This was our family celebration of Sarah's 70th birthday! We love traveling together and making our birthdays very special and unusual occasions. All of our moments together were special . . . "Sanctuary" is a perfect word for this delightful mountain retreat—the perfect cabin to celebrate our sweet Sarah's birthday. We glowed and sparkled and watched and cheered the first triple crown winner in 31 years! Woohoo! Already looking forward to our next visit . . . would love to see the view in the fall.
title: Delightful Mountain Retreat
